overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a vintage car driving through a 1930s-style city at night. The player navigates through urban streets, overtakes vehicles including a delivery truck and semi-trailer, and stops behind a tram waiting for it to proceed.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial street with vehicle traffic

events.description: overtaking the yellow delivery truck on the right side
navigating through intersection while completing the overtake

agents.ego_description: driving through city streets following a yellow truck, then overtaking it on the right side through an intersection

notable_agents.action: yellow delivery truck driving ahead with brake lights on, then turning right at the intersection

entered.detail: box truck with illuminated red brake lights driving ahead on the road
multi-story brick buildings with illuminated windows lining the street
tall ornate street lamps casting warm light on the road
traffic signs and billboards visible along the roadside

segments.scene_description: Driving through a city street at night following a yellow delivery truck. The camera overtakes the truck on the right while navigating through an intersection, with brick commercial buildings lining both sides of the street illuminated by warm streetlights.

scene_state.functional_zone: city intersection with commercial and industrial buildings

events.description: passing large semi-truck with Gemini branding on the left side
turning right at intersection and continuing down the street

agents.ego_description: navigating through city intersections and passing a large commercial semi-truck parked on the left, then turning right

entered.detail: large black semi-trailer truck with Gemini branding and For You text on the side
illuminated water tower visible in the distance against the night sky
tall building with vertical lighting accents and large windows

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the city, passing a large Gemini semi-truck on the left near an intersection. The scene opens up to show a water tower in the distance and more modern buildings on the right, with sparse pedestrian activity visible on the sidewalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with tram tracks and mixed commercial buildings

events.description: approaching a stopped red tram ahead on the tracks
slowing down and coming to a complete stop behind the tram

agents.ego_description: driving down city streets approaching tram tracks, slowing down as a red tram is stopped ahead blocking the road

notable_agents.action: red tram stopped on the tracks with bright red brake lights illuminated

entered.detail: vintage red streetcar stopped on the tracks with glowing red tail lights
metal tram tracks embedded in the asphalt road surface
multi-story residential buildings with fire escapes and lit windows
illuminated vertical neon signs visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Driving along a street with visible tram tracks, approaching a stopped red tram ahead. The vehicle slows to a stop behind the tram, with apartment buildings lining the left side and neon signs visible in the distance down the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic urban street with active tram line

events.description: red tram marked LM 314 passes by on the left track from front to back
tram ahead begins moving forward, camera vehicle starts following

agents.ego_description: stopped behind the tram waiting for it to proceed, watching another tram pass on the left, then following the tram as it moves forward

notable_agents.action: red tram marked LM 314 passing by on the left track moving from front to back

entered.detail: red tram with LM 314 marking passing on the left side track
older brick buildings with awnings and ground floor storefronts

segments.scene_description: Stopped behind the red tram as another tram marked LM 314 passes by on the left. The tram ahead begins moving forward down the tracks, and the camera vehicle follows it through the narrow historic street lined with commercial buildings and tram tracks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a nocturnal 1930s city, transitioning from busy commercial intersections to a narrow street dominated by tram traffic. It begins by overtaking a yellow delivery truck amidst brick buildings illuminated by warm streetlights, moving steadily through the urban grid. As the camera passes a large Gemini semi-truck, the vista opens up to reveal a distant water tower and more modern architecture lining the sidewalks. The scene then shifts toward a residential area with apartment buildings and distant neon signs, where the vehicle slows to a halt behind a stopped red tram. Finally, after another tram passes on the left, the camera follows the red tram as it begins to move forward again, gliding deeper into the historic street.
